behaviors.description: Evaluate-stage writes grounding to `grounding` artifact, not `plan`.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure is at module handoff (evaluate command -> artifact store), not just one pure function. REAL-INFRA: no real OS/network/subprocess required. LLM-DEP rejected: behavior text is storage target correctness, not model-output-content correctness. REJECTION-GATE: Agentic rejected because "stores grounding into a dedicated `grounding` artifact, not the `plan` artifact" scopes to plumbing.
behaviors.test_description: Run evaluate-stage in an in-process run-context + artifact-store harness, then assert `grounding` is newly written and `plan` is unchanged by evaluate.

behaviors.description: Implement-stage reads `grounding` when present and still writes execution output to `plan`.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: needs interaction between implement flow, context reader, and artifact writer. REAL-INFRA: no system boundary needed. LLM-DEP rejected for minimum-level choice because behavior is about read/write routing, not judging model quality. REJECTION-GATE: Agentic rejected by text "reads grounding when available and still writes its execution output to `plan`" (plumbing assertion).
behaviors.test_description: Seed run context with `grounding`; execute implement flow with deterministic generation stub; assert input path consumed `grounding` and output artifact written to `plan` only.

behaviors.description: Deep-dive no longer overwrites `plan` when diagnosis already exists in issue content.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: failure appears when deep-dive logic and artifact persistence interact. REAL-INFRA: no OS/network/subprocess dependency. LLM-DEP rejected: this behavior is side-effect suppression based on existing diagnosis state, not model decision quality. REJECTION-GATE: higher levels disqualified by text "no longer overwrites `plan` as a redundant side effect".
behaviors.test_description: Provide issue content containing diagnosis, run deep-dive stage in harness, and assert no write to `plan` while other expected stage outputs remain intact.

behaviors.description: Artifact lineage is preserved so implement can read `grounding` produced earlier in same run context.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: this is cross-module state handoff (producer stage -> run-context store -> consumer stage). REAL-INFRA: in-process store/harness is sufficient. LLM-DEP rejected: correctness here is lineage visibility, not semantic quality of model output. REJECTION-GATE: Workflow rejected because no requirement in behavior text that multiple model decisions themselves must be validated.
behaviors.test_description: Within one run-context fixture, execute producer write of `grounding`, then implement-stage read; assert same artifact identity/version is retrievable and consumed.

behaviors.description: In full `deep-dive -> write-plan/evaluate -> implement` run, final implementation plan reflects earlier grounding.
behaviors.justification: MULTI-STEP: explicitly a full multi-step chain. LLM-DEP: "final implementation plan reflects grounding" depends on model behavior across staged context handoff, not only plumbing. MOCK-HIDE: deterministic stubs could pass while real model ignores grounding. REJECTION-GATE: Agentic-alone rejected because behavior text requires sequence-level validation across multiple stages, not a single model call.
behaviors.test_description: Execute end-to-end chain with real agent pipeline across stages in one run context; assert final plan includes/uses grounding facts introduced earlier and preserves expected stage transitions.

behaviors.description: If grounding is absent, implement safely falls back, emits valid `plan`, and does not corrupt other artifacts.
behaviors.justification: MOCK-MISS: fallback correctness depends on implement logic plus artifact-store mutation boundaries. REAL-INFRA: no need for real OS/network/subprocess. LLM-DEP rejected for minimum-level because requirement is safe fallback and artifact integrity, not output-quality judgment. REJECTION-GATE: higher levels disqualified by text "falls back safely ... without corrupting other stored artifacts" (state management focus).
behaviors.test_description: Run implement with context lacking `grounding`; assert `plan` is produced, pre-existing non-plan artifacts remain unchanged, and no spurious artifact deletions/overwrites occur.
